creator: g.s@arcor.de
text:
Due to Seamonkey being removed from the ports, I've been trying to change to Thunderbird, but I'd like to keep some old mbox files, so I ran
thunderbird --migration
but I just get an empty window and two errors in my terminal:

JavaScript error: chrome://global/content/bindings/wizard.xml, line 160: ReferenceError: MozXULElement is not defined
JavaScript error: chrome://global/content/bindings/wizard.xml, line 127: TypeError: this._wizardButtons is undefined

I tried the package for 11.3 as well as compiling the port, same result.

my build options        :
        ALSA           : off
        CANBERRA       : off
        DBUS           : off
        DEBUG          : off
        FFMPEG         : off
        GCONF          : off
        JACK           : off
        LIBPROXY       : off
        LIGHTNING      : on
        OPTIMIZED_CFLAGS: on
        PROFILE        : off
        PULSEAUDIO     : off
        SNDIO          : off
        TEST           : off
